---
title: "Jessica Geiger"
description: Thanks for visiting!
image: static/images/profile_pic_piper.jpeg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/danielle-geiger-661bb2271/
    - icon: flask
      href: https://github.com/danigeiger/CGRP_gepant_ML_project
    - icon: envelope
      href: daniellegeiger99@gmail.com
---

I'm Jessica Geiger, and I am a data scientist and biochemist based in the Bay Area.

I received my Bachelor's of Science in Human Physiology with a minor in Biochemistry at University of Oregon
in 2020. By the end of my degree I found a strong interest in the interdisciplinary feild of neuroscience and
immuneology, particularly related to the migraine brain. I completed my Master's in Data Science at Eastern University in June
2025. My final project for my master's was on screening small molecules for invitro candacy for novel therapeudic agents to treat migraines. Click here to view the code that lead up to the final machine learning model and here to run novel moleuclar formulas (SMILES) through the algorithm.   Currently, I work as a long-term substitute with a self-contained fourth grade class.

If you wish to get in contact with me, feel free to send me an [email][contact]
or reach out on LinkedIn.

[contact]: mailto:daniellegeiger99@gmail.com
